<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["vendor","model","region","macVersion"],"properties":{"vendor":{"type":"string"},"model":{"type":"string"},"region":{"type":"string"},"macVersion":{"type":"string"},"codecRuntime":{"type":"string","enum":["js","cayenne_lpp"]},"codecScript":{"type":"string"},"batteryChemistry":{"type":"string"},"measurements":{"type":"object"},"tags":{"type":"object"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  responses={{"200":{"description":"Contributed profile","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object"}}}},"400":{"description":"Request validation error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}},"401":{"description":"Missing/invalid credentials","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}},"403":{"description":"Insufficient permission","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}}}}
